Identity._comment: AB#4208/AB#4388 — Start-Octo runs MCP natively on localhost:5017 and platform-services on localhost:5025, which does not fit the <slug>.${octo.domain} composition. The overrides resolve ${octo.mcp.publicUrl} / ${octo.platform.publicUrl} for the System.Identity.Bootstrap blueprint apply. Cluster deployments run with ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT!=Development and rely on OCTO_BLUEPRINTS__DOMAIN + the composition path instead.
